title: allium nevii
intro: Allium nevii, also known as the Nevius' onion, is a species of wild onion that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Allium nevii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Allium nevii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
